findings.title: Galileo agent-control: Unauthenticated API access to AI agent guardrails runtime
findings.description: Galileo agent-control runtime guardrail service exposed on port 8000 with zero authentication. All API endpoints accessible without credentials including write surfaces. Business logic exposed: refund cap $200, prompt injection regex, agent tool schema with customer-support-agent configuration. Full API read and write access to agent policy configuration.
